data.description:
## Context / Problem
The automated-quality audit found approved maintainability ratchets that cannot be enabled wholesale without failing on existing debt. The project needs staged, blocking enforcement for function complexity, safe Mypy strictness flags, Ruff ASYNC/DTZ, and Ruff RUF hygiene while explicitly deferring disallow-any-generics, disallow-untyped-defs, broader Ruff security rules, and Semgrep expansion.

## Approach
Deliver four independently reviewed stories into a short-lived Gerrit feature branch, then merge the completed branch atomically to main. Each story leaves its own gate green. Rejected: one large cleanup change, because it would mix distinct tools, obscure regressions, and make rollback difficult.

## Child Decomposition
- Complexity: add a symbol-level shrink-only C901 baseline at threshold 15 and wire it into the canonical lint gate.
- Mypy: enable only no_implicit_optional, strict_equality, warn_redundant_casts, and warn_unused_ignores after clearing their measured 24 findings.
- Ruff ASYNC/DTZ: enable ASYNC and fix the three current timezone findings before enabling DTZ.
- Ruff RUF: clear RUF100 and the approved non-ambiguous RUF findings, while explicitly deferring RUF001, RUF002, and RUF003.

## Success Criteria
Every approved ratchet is blocking in local Make targets, pre-commit, branch CI, and the Gerrit Verified path through the existing make lint and make typecheck entrypoints. Existing behavior remains covered by the full test suite, and main receives the stories atomically through the documented feature-branch merge-back.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All four child stories are closed with their focused verification recorded on each ticket; verified with rebar show on every child.
- [ ] The integrated feature branch passes make lint, make typecheck, config-check, and the default plus integration pytest tiers; verified from the feature worktree.
- [ ] [operator-attested] Every story change and the final merge-back receive LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1 with no unresolved comments in Gerrit.
- [ ] [operator-attested] The final no-ff merge is submitted and replicated to origin/main; verified by fetching origin and confirming every child rebar-ticket commit is reachable from origin/main.
data.title: Ratchet approved maintainability and reliability quality gates
